docs.name: Radial Burst Hero
docs.description: A Stripe-style hero block: a canvas radial burst of fine rays — each fading from a bright bottom-center core to faint tips, with dots drifting outward along them — beneath a headline and a count-up stat row. Ships with six time-of-day themes (Pre-dawn, Sunrise, Daytime, Dusk, Sunset, Night) and an in-block switcher; the background crossfades and the burst colors lerp between themes. devicePixelRatio-aware, keyboard-accessible switcher, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`, and uses `motion` for the reveal, theme blend, count-ups, and dropdown.

props.name: defaultTheme
props.description: Initial time-of-day theme. Re-synced if it changes (e.g. from a site theme toggle); the in-block switcher overrides until then.

props.name: title
props.description: Headline content. Defaults to "The backbone of global commerce".

props.name: stats
props.type: { prefix?: string; value: number; decimals?: number; suffix?: string; label: string }[]
props.description: Stat row. Each value counts up on mount; `label` supports newlines. Defaults to the four Stripe-style stats.

props.name: burstProps
props.description: Forwarded to the canvas burst layer (`RadialBurst`). `density` scales ray count (0.4–2).

docs.overview: A canvas radial burst rises from a bright bottom-center core: ~200 fine rays fan across the upper semicircle (longest near vertical, forming a dome), each a base-bright→tip-faint gradient with dots drifting outward. Above it sit a headline and a count-up stat row. Six time-of-day themes — Pre-dawn, Sunrise, Daytime, Dusk, Sunset, Night — are selectable from an in-block dropdown; switching crossfades the background gradient and eases the burst colors between palettes. `RadialBurst` is exported separately for reuse under your own layout.
